  1. uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.maven
  2. DependencyScope

Uses of Class
uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.maven.DependencyScope

Packages that use DependencyScope
Package
Description
uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.maven
Contains the models and tools for interacting with the Apache Maven ecosystem within the NetBeans IDE.
uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.project
Provides a robust integration layer for NetBeans Project APIs, enabling programmatic management of the project lifecycle and environment within the ASI framework.
uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.project.context
Provides a hierarchical context-injection layer for NetBeans projects.

  • Uses of DependencyScope in uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.maven

    Methods in uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.maven that return types with arguments of type DependencyScope
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static List<DependencyScope>
    Maven.getDeclaredDependencies(String projectPath)
    Gets the list of dependencies directly declared in the pom.xml.
    private static List<DependencyScope>
    Maven.groupDeclaredDependencies(List<org.apache.maven.model.Dependency> dependencies)
    Groups a list of flat Maven dependencies into a hierarchical structure by scope and groupId.

    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private final List<DependencyScope>
    ProjectOverview.mavenDeclaredDependencies
    The list of dependencies directly declared in the pom.xml, optimized for token efficiency.

    Method
    Description
    private String
    ProjectContextProvider.formatDependencyScope(DependencyScope scope, String indent)
    Formats a declared Maven dependency scope structure into a Markdown listing.
